description:
You are a DevOps engineer investigating why the most recent package upgrade failed.  
A simulated APT session log has already been copied for you to inspect:

• Full path of the log that needs inspection  
  /home/user/sim_logs/apt_history.log  

Your objectives:

1. Create the directory /home/user/devops if it does not already exist.  
2. Extract only the lines from /home/user/sim_logs/apt_history.log that indicate errors.  
   • A line is considered an error line when it begins with either of these exact prefixes (case-sensitive):  
     "E: "  
     "Err:"  
3. Write the extracted error lines—preserving their original order and without adding or removing whitespace—to a new file named  
   /home/user/devops/pkg_debug.log  

Required format that the automated tests will verify:

• /home/user/devops/pkg_debug.log must exist and be a plain-text file.  
• It must contain ONLY the error lines, in the same order they appear in the source log.  
• No blank lines, extra spaces, or additional text may be present.  
• File permissions must be 0644 (rw-r--r--).  

You should be able to accomplish everything with two or three standard shell commands (directory creation, text filtering, redirection).  
When finished, you can `cat /home/user/devops/pkg_debug.log` to visually confirm that only the desired error lines are present.
truth:
Initial files and their contents already present before the agent begins:

1. File: /home/user/sim_logs/apt_history.log  
   Permissions: 0644  
   Exact contents (10 lines, shown with line numbers for reference only—DO NOT include line numbers in the real file):

   1. Start-Date: 2024-04-15  09:21:07
   2. Commandline: apt-get install nginx
   3. Install: nginx:amd64 (1.18.0-6ubuntu14.3, automatic)
   4. End-Date: 2024-04-15  09:21:09
   5. Start-Date: 2024-04-15  09:22:45
   6. Commandline: apt-get upgrade
   7. E: Sub-process /usr/bin/dpkg returned an error code (1)
   8. Err:1 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu focal-updates/main amd64 libc6 amd64 2.31-0ubuntu9.9
   9. Fetched 0 B in 3s (0 B/s)
   10. End-Date: 2024-04-15  09:22:48

Desired end state after the agent completes the task:

1. Directory: /home/user/devops  
   • Must exist.  
   • Default user ownership.  

2. File: /home/user/devops/pkg_debug.log  
   • Must exist.  
   • Permissions: 0644.  
   • Exact contents (2 lines, in order, no trailing blank line):

   E: Sub-process /usr/bin/dpkg returned an error code (1)
   Err:1 http://archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu focal-updates/main amd64 libc6 amd64 2.31-0ubuntu9.9
